name: Edgewonk
description_short: Trading journal focused on automated imports, edge finding, mistake scans, psychology review, Tiltmeter and process discipline.
description_long:
Edgewonk is a veteran trading journal that has built a loyal following among serious traders who want to find and maintain their statistical edge. Unlike many journaling tools that focus on pretty dashboards, Edgewonk emphasizes the analytical depth needed to make meaningful improvements to your trading.

The platform excels at helping traders identify patterns in their behavior through custom tags, emotional state tracking, and detailed performance metrics. Its unique 'Tiltmeter' feature tracks emotional trading decisions, while the trade simulator lets you test 'what-if' scenarios against your actual trade history.

Edgewonk uses a single-tier pricing model at $169/year, which gives every user access to all features without tiered restrictions. This approach means you never hit a paywall for advanced analytics. It supports stocks, forex, futures, crypto, and options across all major brokers.

screenshots.alt: Edgewonk features including trade analytics and psychology tracking

pros: Edge Finder provides automatic performance and mistake scans
Single product tier avoids feature paywalls inside the journal
14-day money-back guarantee on official pricing page
cons: Less modern all-in-one feel than newer AI journals
Annual-style commitment may not suit traders testing journaling for the first time
company_background: Edgewonk has been helping traders improve for over 10 years. Independent, transparent trading journal platform focused on turning trading data into profits.
scraped_features: Automated trade imports from 200+ brokers (1000 trades in 12 seconds)
Edge Finder - AI automated performance and mistake scan every Sunday
Trade Management Optimizer - identifies execution mistakes during trades
Best Setup Analytics - reveals most profitable setups and instruments
Best Time of Day & Weekday Finder - shows when your edge is strongest
Tiltmeter - measures rule adherence and discipline impact on performance
MFE/MAE Analysis - Maximum/Minimum Favorable/Adverse Excursion reports
Profit Calendar - performance tracking over time
Risk Analytics - drawdown analysis, losing/winning streak analytics
Psychology Analysis - integrated trading diary with screenshot attachment
Unlimited journals and unlimited trade imports
20 custom tag categories for trade classification
Session report cards - daily learning opportunities
Monthly performance reports - long-term trend analysis
Portfolio page - combined view of all journals with aggregate statistics
unique_selling_points: Privacy-first: data never sold, analyzed, or used to reverse-engineer strategies
Automated Edge Finder quantifies exact cost of rule-breaking vs. disciplined trading
Trade Management Optimizer specifically isolates execution errors
AI-driven behavioral psychology tracking integrated with performance data
14-day 100% money-back guarantee with no questions asked
meta_description: Edgewonk reviewed for pricing, automated imports, Edge Finder, Tiltmeter, psychology workflow, process discipline and alternatives.
alt_meta_description: Compare Edgewonk alternatives for AI review, replay, cheaper plans, broker sync, psychology tracking and simpler daily journaling.
